items.title: De'Von Achane: Inks four-year, $68M extension
items.body_text: The Dolphins signed Achane to a four-year, $68 million contract extension Wednesday, NFL reporter Jordan Schultz reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Malik Nabers: Recovering from second procedure
items.body_text: Nabers had a procedure on his knee "multiple weeks ago" to remove scar tissue, but the Giants don't anticipate any change to the wideout's recovery timeline, Dan Duggan of The Athletic reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Bucky Irving: Shoulder injury still lingering
items.body_text: The Buccaneers announced Tuesday that Irving (shoulder) may not be fully cleared for the start of OTAs, Andrew Harbaugh of USA Today reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Michael Penix: Taking part in throwing drills
items.body_text: The Falcons shared a video Tuesday showing Penix (knee - ACL) throwing to Drake London during spring offseason workouts, Marc Raimondi of ESPN reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.
